header.title: Turn hours of video into minutes of reading
header.subtitle: Batch summarize multiple YouTube videos with AI. Get comprehensive insights in your preferred style and language.

form.title: YouTube Summary Generator
form.urlPlaceholder: Paste YouTube links here (one per line)...

tldr.name: TL;DR
tldr.description: Ultra-concise summary that leads with the main conclusion. Perfect for quick scanning and mobile reading.
tldr.bestFor: Quick overviews, mobile users, executives, time-constrained readers
characteristics: Passes Twitter Test (core idea in 280 characters)

bullet_points.name: Bullet Points
bullet_points.description: Scannable key points in structured format. Topline summary followed by prioritized bullets with concrete details.
bullet_points.bestFor: Meeting notes, quick reference, scannable takeaways, team sharing

tutorial.name: Tutorial
tutorial.description: Step-by-step guide with code examples and visual analogies. Extracts the "one technique worth learning" with actionable instructions.
tutorial.bestFor: How-to content, code tutorials, technical guides, learning new skills

detailed.name: Detailed
detailed.description: Comprehensive article-style summary with executive summary, structured sections, and actionable recommendations. Designed to replace watching all videos.
detailed.bestFor: Comprehensive analysis, strategic decisions, replacing video viewing, in-depth research

deep_dive.name: Deep Dive
deep_dive.description: Technical deep dive with comprehensive analysis, performance benchmarks, and multiple implementation approaches. Maximum depth and detail.
deep_dive.bestFor: Technical analysis, performance evaluation, trade-off discussions, research-level detail

form.customPromptPlaceholder: Add any specific instructions or requirements for the summary...
form.customPromptHelper: Optional: Add custom instructions to customize the summary output

urlValidation.invalidTooltip_one: Invalid YouTube URL detected. Please check the format.
urlValidation.invalidTooltip_other: Invalid YouTube URLs detected. Please check the format.

messages.pasteUrl: Paste at least one YouTube URL to continue
messages.selectPreset: Please select a prompt preset to continue

tooltips.urlInput: Paste one or more YouTube URLs here, one per line. The system will validate each URL automatically.
tooltips.controlPanel: Select a prompt preset to customize how the summary is generated. You can also add custom instructions for specific requirements.

toasts.waitForCompletion: Please wait for the summary to complete before saving
toasts.cannotSaveMissingContent: Cannot save: Summary content is missing

deleteDialog.title: Delete Summary
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete this summary? This action cannot be undone.
